zh.lifeSummary: 當Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz於1372年出生在波蘭萊格尼尼次吉時，她的父親Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz25歲，母親Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland11369歲。她於1396年3月6日與Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg在德國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年5月9日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 波恩包格列本多福特比次享年64歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz于1372年出生在波兰萊格尼尼次吉时，她的父亲Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz25岁，母亲Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland11369岁。她于1396年3月6日与Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg在德国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年5月9日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 波恩包格列本多福特比次享年64岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz was born in 1372, in Legnica, Poland, her father, Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz, was 25 and her mother, Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland, was 11369. She married Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg on 6 March 1396, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 May 1436, in Trebitz, Lebendorf, Bernburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 64, and was buried in Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz est née en 1372, à legnickie, Pologne, son père, Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland, avait 11369 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg le 6 mars 1396, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1436, à Trebitz, Lebendorf, Landkreis Bernburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz 1372 in legnickie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz 25 und ihre Mutter Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland 11369. Sie hat am 6. März 1396 in Deutschland Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1436 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Trebitz, Lebendorf, Landkreis Bernburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitzが1372年にポーランドレグニクイで生まれた時，父Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitzは25歳，母Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Polandは11369歳であった。1396年3月6日にドイツでRudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1436年5月9日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス バーンブルグレベンドルフトレビッツで64歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz(이)가 1372년 폴란드 레그닉키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland(은)는 11369세였다. 그녀는 1396년 3월 6일 독일에서 Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 5월 9일 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 버버그 레벤도르프 트레비츠에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz nasceu em 1372, em legnickie, Polônia, seu pai, Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland, tinha 11369 anos. Ela casou-se com Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg em 6 de março de 1396, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1436, em Trebitz, Lebendorf, Landkreis Bernburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz родилась в 1372 г. в местности легникки, Польша, её отцу по имени Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland, 11369. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg 6 марта 1396 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 мая 1436 г. в местности требиц, лебендорф, ландкрис бирнбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz nació en 1372, en legnickie, Polonia, su papá, Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland, tenía 11369 años. Se casó con Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg el 6 de marzo de 1396, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1436, en Trebitz, Lebendorf, Landkreis Bernburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
